title: Municipality warns against WhatsApp scam
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality has issued an urgent warning for locals to block and ignore messages on WhatsApp claiming one's municipal account is in arrears and disconnection is imminent.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality has issued an urgent warning for locals to block and ignore messages on WhatsApp claiming one's municipal account is in arrears and disconnection is imminent."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The municipality stated on its Facebook page that \"fraudsters are contacting members of the public via WhatsApp, falsely stating that immediate payment is required to avoid disconnection or legal action,\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This is a scam. Please block the number immediately and ignore the message. The municipality does not request payments via WhatsApp or unofficial email addresses,\" it said.","html":"\"This is a scam. Please block the number immediately and ignore the message. The municipality does not request payments via WhatsApp or unofficial email addresses,\" it said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It added that all legitimate communication will come only from official Mossel Bay Municipality channels.","html":"It added that all legitimate communication will come only from official Mossel Bay Municipality channels."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It requests that residents and businesses who receive a suspicious message or call report it immediately to 044 606 5000 or email [email protected].","html":"It requests that residents and businesses who receive a suspicious message or call report it immediately to 044 606 5000 or email [email protected]."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Payments to the municipality are accepted only through official methods – at municipal pay points (municipal offices) or via electronic banking platforms,\" it said.","html":"\"Payments to the municipality are accepted only through official methods – at municipal pay points (municipal offices) or via electronic banking platforms,\" it said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
